allow: Bash(python -c "import earthaccess; ea = earthaccess.login\(strategy=''netrc''\); print\(type\(ea\)\); print\(ea.authenticated\)")
Bash(conda run -n gh3_dev python -c "import rasterio; print\(rasterio.__version__\)")
Bash(conda run -n gh3_dev conda list rasterio)
Bash(conda run -n gh3_dev conda list gdal)
Bash(conda run -n gh3_dev conda list python)
Bash(conda run -n gh3_dev conda search -c conda-forge rasterio)
Bash(conda run -n gh3_dev conda install -c conda-forge rasterio=1.4.4 --no-update-deps -y)
Bash(conda run -n gh3_dev python -c "import rasterio; print\(''rasterio OK:'', rasterio.__version__\)")
Bash(conda run -n gh3_dev conda list gdal rasterio)
Bash(conda run -n gh3_dev conda install -c conda-forge "gdal=3.12.2=py314h589ebb0_1" --no-update-deps -y)
